description:
macOS-inspired quick menu for GNOME

## Features

* Recent Items
* Power menu
* Hide Quicksettings buttons
* Hide Activities buttons
* Custom App Store Command
* One Personalized  Menu Item
* macOS style user switcher
* Multilingual support

Reads ~/.local/share/recently-used.xbel for the Recent Items submenu and /etc/passwd to detect whether multiple real user accounts exist (used to decide whether to show the user switcher).
name: Kiwi Menu
